content: Remote OK HR Lead Wowza <p>Cuttling edge global leader in live video software seeks an HR leader to join an already elite team as a full-time permanent employee to own the day-to-day HR function end-to-end for approximately 90 â100 employees in a remote, global company. This role is responsible for building and maintaining a consistent employee experience, ensuring strong compliance foundations, administering benefits, and implementing scalable performance and engagement systems as the company grows.</p><p><br></p><p>Ideal candidate will have 8 plus years of experience partnering with leadership and serving as the primary point of contact for all HR operations, including rolling out OKRs (Rippling a huge plus)</p><p><br></p><p>Huge plus if you have been involved in high-growth startup environments and have a proven history of building successful HR policies and practices.</p><p><br></p><p>We are looking for an inspirational HR lead to head all HR day-to-day practices and champion a strong culture of caring and embracing employee engagement.</p><p><br></p><p>This is an excellent opportunity to join a stable, yet growing organization that treats its employees very well.</p> copywriting, customer support, exec Colorado, Colorado, United States 2026-06-30T02:03:38+00:00 1134242 https://remoteOK.com/remote-jobs/remote-hr-lead-wowza-1134242 https://remoteOK.com/assets/logo-square.png LEAD ABM Industries <strong>About Us<br><br></strong>ABM (NYSE: ABM) is one of the worldâs largest providers of integrated facility, engineering, and infrastructure solutions. Every day, our over 100,000 team members deliver essential services that make spaces cleaner, safer, and efficient, enhancing the overall occupant experience.<br><br>ABM serves a wide range of market sectors including commercial real estate, aviation, education, mission critical, and manufacturing and distribution. With over $8 billion in annual revenue and a blue-chip client base, ABM delivers innovative technologies and sustainable solutions that enhance facilities and empower clients to achieve their goals. Committed to creating smarter, more connected spaces, ABM is investing in the future to meet evolving challenges and build a healthier, thriving world. ABM: Driving possibility, together.<br><br>ABM is an Equal Employment Opportunity (EEO) employer that does not discriminate on the basis of any trait or characteristic protected by applicable federal, state, or local law, including disability and protected veteran status. ABM is committed to working with and providing reasonable accommodation to individuals with disabilities. If you have a disability and need assistance in completing the employment application, please call 888-328-8606. We will provide you with assistance and make a determination on your request for reasonable accommodation on a case-by-case basis.<br><br>ABM participates in the U.S. Department of Homeland Security E-Verify program. E-Verify is an internet-based system used to electronically confirm employment eligibility.<br><br>ABM is a military-friendly company proudly employing thousands of men and women who have served in the U.S. military. Whether youâre looking for a frontline or professional position, you can find post-military career opportunities across ABM.<br><br>ABM directs all applicants to apply at www.abm.com/careers . ABM does not accept unsolicited resumes or submissions outside of this portal. We are passionate about travel, culture, music and bringing people together. Our team is the heart of our brand, and we believe in creating spaces that feel like home while delivering next level service in a fun, energetic environment.<br><br>We create places where you can be yourself, enjoy coming to work and feel part of something bigger than just a job.<br><br><strong>As our journey begins, we're looking for a Housekeeper with immediate starts available - someone who takes real pride in the details, finds satisfaction in a perfectly turned room and understand that their work is at the very heart of the guest experience. This is where you come in.<br><br></strong><strong>Your Part in the Kabannas Story<br><br></strong>As part of our Housekeeping Team, youâll help create the spaces where our guests can truly relax, recharge and feel at home. Youâre the one behind the scenes making the magic happen - bringing care, attention and pride to every room and shared space.<br><br><strong>Key responsibilities:<br><br></strong><ul><li>Prepare and maintain guest rooms to a high standard, ready to welcome every arrival</li><li>Keep shared spaces clean, organised and inviting throughout the day</li><li>Work closely with your team and other departments, keeping communication clear and positive</li><li>Spot and report any maintenance or safety issues.<br><br></li></ul><strong>Who You Are<br><br></strong>You take pride in the details - creating spaces that feel calm, clean and cared for.<br><br>Ideally, you:<br><br><ul><li>Enjoy creating clean, welcoming environments where people feel at ease</li><li>Are reliable, consistent and take ownership of your work</li><li>Work well as part of a team and keep a positive attitude throughout</li><li>Stay organised and manage your time effectively</li><li>Notice the little things that make a big difference</li><li>Care about quality, presentation and the guest experience<br><br></li></ul>Weâre not looking for the perfect CVs, but for <strong>great humans</strong>.<br><br><strong>Why Kabannas?<br><br></strong><ul><li>A team-first culture and some really good people around you</li><li>Real development and career growth - we're building something here, and we want you to grow with it</li><li>Rewards, recognition and experiences that go beyond the day-to-day</li><li>Free and discounted stays, plus generous food &amp; drink discounts, for you, your friends and your family (fair warning: you're about to become very popular)</li><li>Your birthday off, on us</li><li>Paid volunteering, enhanced family leave, health &amp;
